sources: Cadence cruise/yacht supplier commission chart, 2026-06 (CPP + Virtuoso + commission)
_meta.relationshipRule: CPP/preferred-partner -> 'preferred' (top tier, boost +12). Commissionable but not top tier -> 'partner' (+6). No commission/flags listed -> 'standard' placeholder (0). 'avoid' = -100.
_meta.tierRule: commissionTier is assigned on PER-MARKET bands: hotels high=15-16 / mid=12-14 / low=10-11; cruise high=17+ / mid=14-16 / low=11-13. The engine reads the tier LABEL only, so labels stay comparable across atlases even though the % thresholds differ.
_meta.fieldNotes: commissionPct and appliesTo are ADVISORY: lib/supplier-fit.js ranks on commissionTier (label), not on commissionPct. appliesTo documents which atlas a brand belongs to; entries with appliesTo:[] (DMCs/services) never appear in any atlas's results, so no filtering is required for them.
_meta.excluded: No GDS/STAR/access codes, passwords, IATA, or rep contacts are stored here. Keep those in a separate access-controlled store, never served by the concierge API.
reconciled: explora (Explora Lodges, hotel) and explora-journeys (Explora Journeys, MSC cruise) are different companies, kept as separate keys
